items.caption: A single tear drop with a reflective surface, suspended in mid-air against a blurred background that suggests a warm, possibly golden hue. the tear is adorned with small, heart-shaped patterns that resemble water droplets, reinforcing the metaphorical description of a tear being made of water. the text overlay, "a tear is made of 1 % water and 99 % feelings," is superimposed on the image, providing a poignant commentary on the emotional composition of a tear.
